userStories.title: Respond to punkpeye on GitHub PR #1676
userStories.description: The PR was merged and punkpeye asked for Discord username and server claiming. Post a thank you response with username and next steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Mention that we will join Discord and share username
Mention we will claim servers on Glama.ai
userStories.notes: Simple GitHub comment - PR already merged

userStories.title: Document Discord joining process for William
userStories.description: Create a quick action item for William to join MCP Discord and get flair. Ralph can't join Discord, but can prepare the steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Include steps to share username with punkpeye
Include steps to claim servers on Glama.ai
userStories.notes: Requires human action - Claude can't join Discord

userStories.title: Verify Apollo MCP is published to PyPI
userStories.description: Check if apollo-mcp is published to PyPI. If not, prepare it for publishing using SOPs 11-12.
acceptanceCriteria: If not published, verify package structure (pyproject.toml, src/apollo_mcp/)

userStories.title: Publish Apollo MCP to PyPI if needed
userStories.description: If Apollo MCP is not on PyPI, build and publish it following SOP 12.

userStories.title: Publish Apollo MCP to Claude MCP Registry
userStories.description: After PyPI publish, submit to Claude MCP Registry using mcp-publisher.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify server.json exists and is valid
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Requires GitHub auth for mcp-publisher

userStories.title: Create comprehensive MCP status report
userStories.description: Audit all MCPs and create status report showing what's published where.
acceptanceCriteria: List all MCPs (md-to-pdf, amazon-seller, fitness-influencer, rideshare, hvac, apollo)
Check MCP Registry status for each
Check GitHub repos exist for each

userStories.title: Submit remaining MCPs to MCP.so and MCP Market
acceptanceCriteria: Create GitHub issue at https://github.com/chatmcp/mcpso/issues for MCP.so submission

metadata.objective: Complete all MCP publishing tasks: respond to punkpeye, publish Apollo MCP, audit all MCPs, submit to remaining directories
